calendar.matters:
Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Mar-12-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Capital Financial Credit, LLC
Pearlie Asotigue, Judgment debtor in Propria Persona

After hearing, The claim of exemption is granted in part and denied in part.
The levying officer is directed to release any earning held to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment.
The levying officer shall withheld $125.00 per pay period until judgment is satisfied or further Court Order. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
